reference.role: User-selected style, palette, density, atmosphere and composition reference

prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: production game main-menu background, 16:9 landscape. Image 1 is the exact style, palette, density, atmosphere, and composition reference. Create a new original, richly detailed Terraria-like side-view pixel-art fantasy sandbox world background matching the reference closely in visual ambition and structure: enormous ancient jungle trees framing both edges; inhabited treehouse platforms with warm lanterns; layered misty blue-green mountains; overgrown temple ruins and terraced stone platforms; several waterfalls; exactly three prominent floating islands with foliage, roots and thin waterfalls; deep foreground plants, flowers, mushrooms and moss. Handcrafted high-detail 2D pixel art with crisp clustered pixels. Full-bleed side-view establishing shot with dense edge framing, an open central valley and a naturally calmer darker center-left menu area. Magical violet-blue dusk fading to coral-gold, cool valley mist, amber lights and bioluminescent accents. No text, logo, menu buttons, UI panels, border, watermark, photorealism, vector art or 3D render.
postProcessing: Copied without color or geometry edits. A 836x471 nearest-neighbor preview was generated for review.
